testcase.name: test_read
testcase.failure:
uri = 'https://www.ine.es/jaxiT3/files/es/1001.px', encoding = 'iso-8859-15' timeout = 10
def read(uri, encoding, timeout=10): """Read a text file from file system or URL.
Args: uri (str): file name or URL encoding (str): charset encoding timeout (int): request timeout; optional
Returns: raw_pcaxis (str): file contents.
""" raw_pcaxis = ''
if uri_type(uri) == 'URL': try: response = treq.get(uri, timeout=timeout) > response.raise_for_status() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'raise_for_status'
pyaxis/pyaxis.py:87: AttributeError
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:
def test_read(): """Check if a URL is loaded into a string variable.""" > pc_axis = pyaxis.read( 'https://www.ine.es/jaxiT3/files/es/1001.px', 'iso-8859-15')
pyaxis/test/integration/test_pyaxis.py:25: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
uri = 'https://www.ine.es/jaxiT3/files/es/1001.px', encoding = 'iso-8859-15' timeout = 10
def read(uri, encoding, timeout=10): """Read a text file from file system or URL.
Args: uri (str): file name or URL encoding (str): charset encoding timeout (int): request timeout; optional
Returns: raw_pcaxis (str): file contents.
""" raw_pcaxis = ''
if uri_type(uri) == 'URL': try: response = treq.get(uri, timeout=timeout) response.raise_for_status() raw_pcaxis = response.text() > except treq.exceptions.ConnectTimeout as connect_timeout: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'treq' has no attribute 'exceptions'
pyaxis/pyaxis.py:89: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_metadata_extract
testcase.failure:
uri = 'https://www.ine.es/jaxi/files/_px/es/px/t20/e301/matri/a2000/l0/14001.px?nocab=1' encoding = 'iso-8859-15', timeout = 10
def read(uri, encoding, timeout=10): """Read a text file from file system or URL.
Args: uri (str): file name or URL encoding (str): charset encoding timeout (int): request timeout; optional
Returns: raw_pcaxis (str): file contents.
""" raw_pcaxis = ''
if uri_type(uri) == 'URL': try: response = treq.get(uri, timeout=timeout) > response.raise_for_status() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'raise_for_status'
pyaxis/pyaxis.py:87: AttributeError
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:
def test_metadata_extract(): """Should extract pcaxis metadata into a list.""" > pc_axis = pyaxis.read( 'https://www.ine.es/jaxi/files/_px/es/px/t20/e301/matri/a2000/l0/' '14001.px?nocab=1', 'iso-8859-15')
pyaxis/test/integration/test_pyaxis.py:35: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
uri = 'https://www.ine.es/jaxi/files/_px/es/px/t20/e301/matri/a2000/l0/14001.px?nocab=1' encoding = 'iso-8859-15', timeout = 10
def read(uri, encoding, timeout=10): """Read a text file from file system or URL.
Args: uri (str): file name or URL encoding (str): charset encoding timeout (int): request timeout; optional
Returns: raw_pcaxis (str): file contents.
""" raw_pcaxis = ''
if uri_type(uri) == 'URL': try: response = treq.get(uri, timeout=timeout) response.raise_for_status() raw_pcaxis = response.text() > except treq.exceptions.ConnectTimeout as connect_timeout: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'treq' has no attribute 'exceptions'
pyaxis/pyaxis.py:89: AttributeError

def test_get_dimensions(): """Should return two lists (dimension names and members).""" > pc_axis = pyaxis.read( 'https://www.ine.es/jaxi/files/_px/es/px/t20/e301/matri/a2000/l0/' '14001.px?nocab=1', 'iso-8859-15')

if uri_type(uri) == 'URL': try: response = treq.get(uri, timeout=timeout) > response.raise_for_status() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'raise_for_status'
pyaxis/pyaxis.py:87: AttributeError
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:
def test_build_dataframe(): """Should return a dataframe with n+1 columns (dimensions + data).""" null_values = r'^"\."$' sd_values = r'"\.\."' > pc_axis = pyaxis.read( 'https://www.ine.es/jaxi/files/_px/es/px/t20/e301/matri/a2000/l0/' '14001.px?nocab=1', 'iso-8859-15')

def read(uri, encoding, timeout=10): """Read a text file from file system or URL.
Args: uri (str): file name or URL encoding (str): charset encoding timeout (int): request timeout; optional
Returns: raw_pcaxis (str): file contents.
""" raw_pcaxis = ''
if uri_type(uri) == 'URL': try: response = treq.get(uri, timeout=timeout) response.raise_for_status() raw_pcaxis = response.text() > except treq.exceptions.ConnectTimeout as connect_timeout: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'treq' has no attribute 'exceptions'
pyaxis/pyaxis.py:89: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_parse
testcase.failure:
uri = 'https://www.ine.es/jaxi/files/_px/es/px/t20/e301/matri/a2000/l0/14001.px?nocab=1' encoding = 'ISO-8859-15', timeout = 10
def read(uri, encoding, timeout=10): """Read a text file from file system or URL.
Args: uri (str): file name or URL encoding (str): charset encoding timeout (int): request timeout; optional
Returns: raw_pcaxis (str): file contents.
""" raw_pcaxis = ''
if uri_type(uri) == 'URL': try: response = treq.get(uri, timeout=timeout) > response.raise_for_status() ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: 'Deferred' object has no attribute 'raise_for_status'
pyaxis/pyaxis.py:87: AttributeError
During handling of the above exception, another exception occurred:
def test_parse(): """Should parse a pc-axis into a dataframe and a metadata dictionary""" > parsed_pcaxis = pyaxis.parse( 'https://www.ine.es/jaxi/files/_px/es/px/t20/e301/matri/a2000/l0/' '14001.px?nocab=1', encoding='ISO-8859-15')
pyaxis/test/integration/test_pyaxis.py:100: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ pyaxis/pyaxis.py:139: in parse pc_axis = read(uri, encoding, timeout) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
uri = 'https://www.ine.es/jaxi/files/_px/es/px/t20/e301/matri/a2000/l0/14001.px?nocab=1' encoding = 'ISO-8859-15', timeout = 10
def read(uri, encoding, timeout=10): """Read a text file from file system or URL.
Args: uri (str): file name or URL encoding (str): charset encoding timeout (int): request timeout; optional
Returns: raw_pcaxis (str): file contents.
""" raw_pcaxis = ''
if uri_type(uri) == 'URL': try: response = treq.get(uri, timeout=timeout) response.raise_for_status() raw_pcaxis = response.text() > except treq.exceptions.ConnectTimeout as connect_timeout: ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'treq' has no attribute 'exceptions'
pyaxis/pyaxis.py:89: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_http_error
testcase.failure:
def test_http_error(): """Using parse() with a non-existent URL should return a 404.""" url = 'https://www.ine.es/jaxi' > with pytest.raises(treq.exceptions.HTTPError): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'treq' has no attribute 'exceptions'
pyaxis/test/integration/test_pyaxis.py:117: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_connection_error
testcase.failure:
def test_connection_error(): """Using parse() with a wrong URL should return a connection error.""" url = 'https://www.ine.net/jaxiT3/files/t/es/px/1001.px'
> with pytest.raises(treq.exceptions.ConnectionError): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ E AttributeError: module 'treq' has no attribute 'exceptions'
pyaxis/test/integration/test_pyaxis.py:125: AttributeError

testcase.name: test_parse
testcase.failure:
def test_parse(): """Should parse a pc-axis into a dataframe and a metadata dictionary""" parsed_pcaxis = pyaxis.parse( data_path + '14001.px', encoding='ISO-8859-15') > assert parsed_pcaxis['DATA'].dtypes['DATA'] == 'object' E AssertionError: assert <StringDtype(storage='python', na_value=nan)> == 'object'
pyaxis/test/unit/test_pyaxis.py:222: AssertionError

testcase.name: test_statistical_disclosure
testcase.failure:
def test_statistical_disclosure(): """Should parse a pc-axis with statistical disclosure into a dataframe.
Uses convenient Na or NaN representations and a metadata dict. """ parsed_pcaxis = pyaxis.parse( data_path + '27067.px', encoding='ISO-8859-2') > assert parsed_pcaxis['DATA'].dtypes['DATA'] == 'object' E AssertionError: assert <StringDtype(storage='python', na_value=nan)> == 'object'
pyaxis/test/unit/test_pyaxis.py:240: AssertionError
